course.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #12 - Quest for the Anvil!
course.description: Learn English with Minecraft — Episode 10. 5 curated listening segments with cloze quizzes.

lesson.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #12 - Quest for the Anvil!

question.prompt: What was the player's main goal in this episode?

options: To find resources underground for building an anvil
To build a new house in the village
To tame wolves and build a pet shelter
